name: part_001
file: tmp_【#冥ハロ2025】白上フブキ生誕３DLIVE「冥界Halloween Night!」【白上フブキ⧸ホロライブ】 [7Tm7dVsTPBk]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_001.webm

scenes.description: A mascot character performs the song 'Kinmokusei'.
The mascot character performs 'Hoshizora e to Tsuzuku Sakamichi'.
An introduction sequence featuring various Hololive members and the event title.

subtitles.original: ああ　どれだけ歌っても
subtitles.english: Ah, no matter how much I sing,

subtitles.original: この声は君には届かない
subtitles.english: This voice won't reach you.

subtitles.original: ああ　どれだけ歌っても
subtitles.english: Ah, no matter how much I sing,

subtitles.original: この声は君には届かない
subtitles.english: This voice won't reach you.

subtitles.original: ああ　息が苦しくなる
subtitles.english: Ah, it's getting hard to breathe,

subtitles.original: この歌もいつしか終わりが来る
subtitles.english: This song, too, will eventually come to an end.

subtitles.original: ああ　息が苦しくなる
subtitles.english: Ah, it's getting hard to breathe,

subtitles.original: この地球もいつかは終わりが来る
subtitles.english: This planet, too, will eventually come to an end.

subtitles.original: 金木犀の匂いをまた
subtitles.english: The scent of osmanthus once again...

subtitles.original: 思い出した
subtitles.english: I remembered.

subtitles.original: In the dusk,
subtitles.english: In the dusk,

subtitles.original: amid the wintry wind...
subtitles.english: amid the wintry wind...

subtitles.original: The shadow of a girl...
subtitles.english: The shadow of a girl...

subtitles.original: Suddenly, the prologue begins.
subtitles.english: Suddenly, the prologue begins.

subtitles.original: 気付けば…駆けだしていた…
subtitles.english: Before I knew it... I was running...

subtitles.original: 揺れ動く…心のままに…
subtitles.english: Following... my swaying heart...

subtitles.original: 遠ざかる…白い壁…
subtitles.english: Fading away... the white wall...

subtitles.original: 一度も…振り返らずに…
subtitles.english: Without... looking back once...

subtitles.original: 《生命》が…消え逝く季節の…
subtitles.english: In the season... where life fades away...

subtitles.original: 胸を刺す…気配の中で…
subtitles.english: Amidst the feeling... that pierces my chest...

subtitles.original: 迫りくる…暗闇…
subtitles.english: The approaching... darkness...

subtitles.original: 二度と…明けぬような気がして…
subtitles.english: Feeling like... it would never dawn again...

subtitles.original: 転がり落ちそうな心
subtitles.english: A heart that seemed like it would roll and fall,

subtitles.original: 必死に抱き止めていた…
subtitles.english: I was desperately holding onto it...

subtitles.original: 星空へと続く長い坂道は
subtitles.english: Because the long slope leading to the starry sky,

subtitles.original: 永遠にも…思えたから――
subtitles.english: Seemed... even like eternity—

subtitles.original: 咲く花や…散りぬるを…
subtitles.english: The flowers that bloom... and fall...

subtitles.original: 神代の《時代》より繰り返す…
subtitles.english: Repeating since the age of the gods...

subtitles.original: 私はそれを…美しいとは…
subtitles.english: I have never... thought of that...

subtitles.original: 思ったことがない…
subtitles.english: as being beautiful...

subtitles.original: 久方の…春の陽を…
subtitles.english: Scramble for the long-awaited spring sunlight,

subtitles.original: 仮初めの影が奪い合う…
subtitles.english: scrambled for by transient shadows...

subtitles.original: その営みを…美しいとは…
subtitles.english: I have never... thought of that way of life...

subtitles.original: 思ったことがない…
subtitles.english: as being beautiful...

subtitles.original: 諦めながら…生きてた…
subtitles.english: I lived... while giving up...

subtitles.original: 何も望まないように　それでも…
subtitles.english: Trying not to wish for anything, and yet...

subtitles.original: 手放せなかった…最後の願いを…
subtitles.english: I couldn't let go... Grasping my last wish,

subtitles.original: 握りしめて駆け上がる
subtitles.english: I run up.

subtitles.original: 尾丸ポルカ
subtitles.english: Omaru Polka

subtitles.original: 猫又おかゆ
subtitles.english: Nekomata Okayu

subtitles.original: 大神ミオ
subtitles.english: Ookami Mio

subtitles.original: 天音かなた
subtitles.english: Amane Kanata

subtitles.original: さくらみこ
subtitles.english: Sakura Miko

subtitles.original: 鷹嶺ルイ
subtitles.english: Takane Lui

subtitles.original: フワワ・アビスガード　モココ・アビスガード
subtitles.english: Fuwawa Abyssgard, Mococo Abyssgard

subtitles.original: 白上フブキ
subtitles.english: Shirakami Fubuki

subtitles.original: 冥界 Halloween Night! FBKINGDOM
subtitles.english: Underworld Halloween Night! FBKINGDOM

subtitles.original: 我武者羅に生きるお前が笑われて
subtitles.english: In a world where you, living recklessly, are laughed at,

subtitles.original: 楽に生きる奴らが徳をする世界で？
subtitles.english: and those who live easy lives profit?

subtitles.original: 我だけはお前のことを笑わない！
subtitles.english: I'm the only one who won't laugh at you!

subtitles.original: 皆が指差し笑おうとも我は笑わない！
subtitles.english: Even if everyone points and laughs, I won't laugh!

subtitles.original: ああ人は滅んでゆく　綻んでゆく
subtitles.english: Ah, people are perishing, falling apart,

subtitles.original: 才を妬み合い富を奪い合い
subtitles.english: envying talent and scrambling for wealth.

subtitles.original: ああ人は滅んでゆく　綻んでゆく
subtitles.english: Ah, people are perishing, falling apart.

subtitles.original: その果てに見えた海は　地獄だろうか？それとも地獄だろうか？
subtitles.english: The sea seen at the end... Is it hell? Or is it hell?

subtitles.original: 我武者羅に生きるお前が笑われて
subtitles.english: In a world where you, living recklessly, are laughed at,

subtitles.original: 楽に生きる奴らが徳をする世界で？
subtitles.english: and those who live easy lives profit?

subtitles.original: 我だけはお前のことを笑わない！
subtitles.english: I'm the only one who won't laugh at you!
